zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，关注方向选择
zh.content:
从当前价格表现看，SOL/USD报64.57，24小时跌幅仅0.15%，整体维持窄幅整理格局。价格运行于日内高低点64.73至64.48之间，波动明显收敛，显示市场多空力量暂时均衡，短线处于震荡偏弱阶段，等待新的突破信号出现。

均线方面，当前价格略低于SMA(20)的64.64，表明短期趋势略偏空，但偏离幅度极小，尚未形成明显下跌结构。MACD数值为0.3288且保持正值，说明中期动能仍有一定支撑，不过由于缺乏信号线数据，金叉或死叉状态暂时无法进一步确认。

关键位置方面，64.48构成短线第一支撑，若跌破则可能下探64.20附近区域；上方阻力首先关注64.73日内高点，突破后有机会测试65.00整数关口。当前价格位于支撑与阻力之间，市场正处于方向选择阶段，成交量变化值得重点关注。

交易策略上，激进交易者可关注64.48附近的支撑反应进行低吸尝试，并设置严格止损；稳健投资者则建议等待有效突破64.73后顺势跟进。由于RSI数据缺失，短线信号完整性不足，宜控制仓位，避免在震荡区间内频繁追涨杀跌。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 64.57, slightly below the 20-period SMA at 64.64, indicating a neutral-to-bearish short-term bias. The narrow daily range between 64.48 and 64.73 suggests consolidation rather than a decisive directional move. With the price hovering near its moving average and showing a marginal 24-hour decline of 0.15%, market participants appear cautious, waiting for a catalyst before committing to a stronger trend.

Momentum indicators present a mixed picture. The MACD remains positive at 0.3288, which suggests underlying bullish momentum has not fully disappeared despite recent price weakness. However, the absence of a signal line and RSI reading limits confirmation of trend strength. The fact that price remains slightly below the SMA(20) implies buyers have not yet regained full control. A sustained move above the moving average would improve the technical outlook and increase the probability of a short-term recovery.

Key support is located around the session low of 64.48, followed by a stronger psychological zone near 64.00. A breakdown below these levels could trigger additional selling pressure and expose lower support areas. On the upside, immediate resistance sits near 64.73, the recent high, with a stronger barrier likely emerging around 65.00. A breakout above resistance would signal renewed buying interest and potentially attract momentum traders.

From a trading perspective, conservative traders may prefer to wait for confirmation above 64.73 before considering long positions, targeting a move toward higher resistance levels. More aggressive traders could monitor rebounds from the 64.48 support area for short-term opportunities, provided risk is carefully managed. If price closes decisively below support, bearish setups become more attractive. Given the current consolidation environment, disciplined position sizing and strict stop-loss placement remain essential until a clearer trend emerges.
